title: Circular Progress
description: Circular progress visually represents the percentage of an operation's progress within a circular format. It features customizable colors and stroke styles, providing a clear and dynamic way to indicate the status of ongoing tasks.

sections.title: Using content inside
sections.description: Circular progress can display specific contents or percentages inside

sections.title: Customization
sections.description: Circular progress has the ability to adjust the size and stroke along with the color

sections.title: Async progress
sections.description: Simulate asynchronous progress with a restart button.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Specifies the color of the circular progress indicator. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: mode
props.description: Defines the current progress mode of the circular progress component.

props.name: progress
props.description: Specifies the progress value of the circular progress indicator.

props.name: stroke
props.description: Determines the stroke width of the circular progress indicator.

props.name: size
props.description: Specifies the size of the circular progress indicator.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when any option of the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: progressChange
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the progress value of the circular progress indicator changes.

events.name: strokeChange
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the stroke width of the circular progress indicator changes.

events.name: sizeChange
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the size of the circular progress indicator changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets the CSS custom properties to reflect the current `size` and `stroke` values.
 *
 * Updates `--ax-comp-circular-progress-circle-size` and `--ax-comp-circular-progress-stroke-size` on the circle.
 *
 * @returns void - Styles are applied to the circle element when available.
 */
setCircularSize(): void

/**
 * Recalculates and applies the progress arc background based on the current `progress` value.
 *
 * Uses a conic-gradient with `--ax-comp-progress-circular-color` and `--ax-comp-progress-circular-line-color`.
 * The expected range for `progress` is 0–100.
 *
 * @returns void - Styles are applied to the circle element when available.
 */
updateProgress(): void

/**
 * Applies a default visual state for the indeterminate mode when no explicit `progress` is set.
 *
 * If `mode` is 'indeterminate' and `progress` is not set, it sets `progress` to 65 to render a visible arc.
 *
 * @returns void
 */
setIndeterminateMode(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
